qry:select.name: RS1
qry:select.qry:xquery: for $r in sql('SELECT t.oi_item_ig as ID, t.c_item_ig as CODE, t.d_item_ig as TEXT, SEC.policy FROM LIQ04_ITEMS_IG as t, NMD_SECURITY(class=\'NucleusRH.Base.Liquidacion.Items_Deducibles_de_Ganancias.ITEM_IG\') as SEC JOIN t.oi_item_ig LEFT OUTER SEC.id WHERE t.oi_item_ig={#SOURCE:helper-mess/@ID} and t.oi_tipo_deduc in (1,3) ORDER BY CODE asc')/ROWS/ROW

qry:select.name: RS1
qry:select.qry:xquery: for $r in sql('SELECT t.oi_item_ig as ID, t.c_item_ig as CODE, t.d_item_ig as TEXT, SEC.policy FROM LIQ04_ITEMS_IG as t, NMD_SECURITY(class=\'NucleusRH.Base.Liquidacion.Items_Deducibles_de_Ganancias.ITEM_IG\') as SEC JOIN t.oi_item_ig LEFT OUTER SEC.id WHERE t.c_item_ig={substring_before(#INDOC:@CODE,\'-\')} and t.oi_tipo_deduc in (1,3) ORDER BY CODE asc')/ROWS/ROW

qry:select.name: RS1
qry:select.qry:xquery: for $r in sql('SELECT t.oi_item_ig as ID, t.c_item_ig as CODE, t.d_item_ig as TEXT, SEC.policy FROM LIQ04_ITEMS_IG as t, NMD_SECURITY(class=\'NucleusRH.Base.Liquidacion.Items_Deducibles_de_Ganancias.ITEM_IG\') as SEC JOIN t.oi_item_ig LEFT OUTER SEC.id WHERE t.oi_tipo_deduc in (1,3) ORDER BY CODE asc')/ROWS/ROW
